## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and quality improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is strong: 1,173 clicks for best article, 99,391 cumulative clicks, 400K+ impressions](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Focus on non-branded keywords and authentication/authorization topics for next content batch](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Integration page quality concerns being addressed; workflow improvements in progress](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [YouTube video integration and CTA updates planned for completion by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [New content strategy with 50 topics based on non-branded keywords to be delivered Monday](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Best performing article: 1,173 clicks, 54K impressions](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)
  - [Cumulative: 99,391 clicks, 400K+ impressions over past period](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Authentication/authorization topic performing exceptionally well (6% CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)
  - [AI tools content also showing good performance](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)

### Integration Pages Quality Improvement

  - [Addressing outdated references issue raised by Theo](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [CTO working on calibrating workflows for Strapi-specific content](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Andrej improving personal process for quality control before backend upload](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Exploring integration of OpenAI's new model (suggested by Paul) for better context and web scraping](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### Content Strategy Updates

  - [Developing roadmap for non-branded keywords (delivery planned for Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)
  - [Creating new batch of 50 topics, focusing on non-branded keywords and best-performing articles](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Aiming to create topic clusters around high-performing subjects (e.g., authentication/authorization)](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=232.0)

### YouTube Video Integration

  - [Plan to add videos to 15-20 best-performing articles by Friday EOD](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Team to assist in selecting appropriate videos from Strapi's channel](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)

### CTA Updates

  - [Golzar provided updates for contact sales, conference CTA, and download CE categories](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Andrej aims to implement changes across all countries by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

### Content Freshness and Accuracy

  - [Theo raised concerns about outdated references (e.g., Laravel versions)](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Workflow improvements planned to ensure more recent and accurate information](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Suggestion to provide workflow with recent Strapi announcements and major updates](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to deliver non-branded keyword roadmap by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Complete YouTube video integration for 15-20 articles by Friday EOD](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Implement CTA updates across all countries by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=688.0)

  - [Continue work on integration page quality improvements](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=274.0)
  - [Team to provide Andrej with recent Strapi announcements and updates for content accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [Andrej to keep team updated on progress throughout the week via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/hX_RbzUp9k2xXK3u7qjFUZnAT7X1JxKy?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
